scripts.dev: concurrently --names server,client --prefix-colors cyan,magenta --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:server" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3001/api/health && npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:client
scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
